answer:
The determinant of the matrix  
\[
\begin{vmatrix}
1 & -4 & -5 \\
1 & 2 & 3 \\
-3 & 1 & -2
\end{vmatrix}
\]  
is calculated as  
\(1(2 \cdot -2 - 3 \cdot 1) - (-4)(1 \cdot -2 - 3 \cdot -3) + (-5)(1 \cdot 1 - 2 \cdot -3)\).  
This simplifies to \(1(-4 - 3) + 4(-2 + 9) -5(1 + 6) = -7 + 28 - 35 = -14\).

Thus, the correct answer is G.

\boxed{G}
